name: INTUITIVE SURGICAL INC
summary: Intuitive Surgical Inc. develops, manufactures, and markets robotic-assisted surgical systems. Its flagship da Vinci surgical system enables minimally invasive surgery across multiple specialties. The company sells systems to hospitals along with instruments, accessories, and endoscopes, and provides services including training and maintenance. It operates globally, with manufacturing in Mexico, Germany, and other locations, and maintains a joint venture in China with Shanghai Fosun Pharmaceutical.
